title: Pamir
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Pamir_shu.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] ''Pamir 1'' under attack from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]].]]
'''''Pamir''''' referred to a group of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] that were employed by a group of [[Nharwaak]] researchers during the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]]. As [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces assaulted the Nharwaak research facility, the shuttles of ''Pamir'' group took pilots to their [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] in order to defend themselves from the Imperial onslaught. However, a force of Imperial [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] were able to destroy both shuttles.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
